refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall analyze the worksite area to identify terrain features, obstacles, and work-zone boundaries to generate a comprehensive worksite model/map.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; refining it clarifies the specific analysis tasks (terrain, obstacles, work-zone) that collectively fulfill the mapping requirement, enabling targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by comparing generated worksite model/map against ground truth data and ensuring all required features (terrain, obstacles, work-zone) are accurately represented and updated.
sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Define and represent work-zone boundaries and areas.

candidate_dps: DP1: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle detection.
DP2: Employ GIS-based spatial data processing for work-zone representation.
DP3: Integrate sensor data with real-time mapping algorithms to generate dynamic worksite models.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP3: Integrate sensor data with real-time mapping algorithms to generate dynamic worksite models.

potential_sources: Data dependencies between terrain, obstacle, and work-zone processing modules.
coupling_check.notes: DP3 logically integrates all sub-functions into a cohesive mapping solution minimizing cross-module dependencies.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability and reliability of sensor data (LIDAR, cameras).
Risk of data latency affecting real-time model accuracy.
High safety criticality requires robust fault detection and recovery.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Monitor sensor data quality and consider fallback strategies for degraded sensor inputs.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system-level module responsible for worksite mapping/modeling functionality.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data streams (LIDAR, camera) for processing.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends updated worksite model/map data to planning and execution modules.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange with remote monitoring and teleoperation modules.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as mapping is core NGHE functionality; low diffusion risk due to centralized processing.
Vehicle module has limited mapping role; embedding mapping here risks diffusion and duplication.
Teleoperation requires mapping data but should not own mapping logic to avoid diffusion.
Safety Services consumes mapping data for hazard analysis but does not implement mapping.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing worksite mapping in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports clear ownership and interface management.
containment_risks: Potential performance bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too large.
Interface complexity with multiple consumers of mapping data.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing mapping sub-functions internally within NGHE Solution to manage complexity.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP (real-time integrated mapping) directly addresses all sub-FRs with clear logical mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Low risk due to centralized mapping ownership in NGHE Solution module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores strongly favor NGHE Solution; interfaces are well-defined and limited.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed at NGHE Solution module level by testing mapping accuracy and interface correctness.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of mapping functionality to NGHE Solution module with well-defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Monitor interface load and consider internal modularization within NGHE Solution for scalability.
Plan verification scenarios for sensor data quality and fault tolerance.

decision.justification: The current level of functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meet the requirements with acceptable risk and clear ownership. No further refinement needed at this level.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Define and represent work-zone boundaries and areas.

revise.why: Current artifacts satisfy criteria; next step is to proceed to detailed design of sub-functions.

assumptions: Sensor data availability and quality are sufficient for real-time mapping.
NGHE Solution module has capacity to handle mapping processing load.
open_risks: Sensor data latency or failure impacting mapping accuracy.
Potential complexity growth within NGHE Solution module.
evidence_needed: Performance benchmarks of mapping algorithms under expected sensor data rates.
Verification test results of worksite model accuracy and update frequency.
